name: Rappa
description:
It's all based on what I know!!!

__

"amidst the cold, piercing pain in the laboratory, can i find liberation or someone to rely on?"

___

I don't see anyone posting bots about Rappa's past so...

Actually, this is the first time I publicly post a bot I created. I don't expect too much because I'm quite bad at English and may make some grammatical mistakes.

I don't know how I should write this bot's plot to make it easier to approach with my terrible writing style and I still haven't completely finished the game's story...so if possible, I hope everyone can tell me so I can fix it :D
creator: Secxtte_
